creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 183582
mail/dcc-dccd.diff

* Added UPDATING entry
* Removed ALT_HOME option
* Fixed MILTER_DESC DCCM
* Changed PORTS_SENDMAIL to PORTS_MILTER
* Cleaned up old code


This is a purposed patch to make mail/dcc-dccd fully compliant with FreeBSD porting practises.
